qna1.question: What is Push Cult?
qna1.answer: <1>Push Cult is a curated, invite-only program for <2>50 elite creators</2> who deliver pure signal, not spam.</1><1>We reward visionaries who guide their flock with truth, through threads, videos, or articles that genuinely connect with audiences.</1><1>Top 50 Disciples split a <2>20,000,000 PC bounty</2> based on measurable impact.</1>

qna2.question: Who should apply?
qna2.answer: <1><2>Creators who:</2> already produce guides, threads, or explainers with an engaged audience (not necessarily huge).</1><1><2>Care about:</2> shipping clarity over hype, building legacy over quick flips.</1><1><2>Want to be early:</2> evangelize Push Chain's Universal Execution era and onboard believers to Season 3.</1><1>If you seek a quick flip, walk away. If you seek to build a legacy, <3>step forward</3>.</1>

qna3.question: How are Disciples selected and evaluated?
qna3.answer: <1>We cap at <2>50 Disciples</2> to ensure focus. Participation is renewed weekly based on your <2>Devotion Score</2>.</1><1><2>Devotion Score</2> combines: Signal (reach), Gathering (new believers onboarded), Faith (retention), and Craft (manual review).</1><1>If you fall below threshold, you rotate out. Great creators compete on quality, not volume.</1>

qna4.question: What do Disciples actually do?
qna4.answer: <1>Create content in <2>your format</2>. It can be threads, videos, articles or whatever suits your vibe. Your mandate: explain Push Chain concepts, guide the Flock through Testnet, onboard believers to Season 3.</1><1>We provide: weekly missions, themes, and alpha before the public sees it. You shape the narrative.</1><1>Spam burns to ash. Only the truth survives.</1>

qna5.question: What are the rewards?
qna5.answer: <1><2>Top performers receive:</2> Guaranteed allocation from the 20M PC pool, plus an Ultra Rare Shiny Pass (on mainnet).</1><1><2>Shiny Pass grants:</2> revenue share from chain fees, validator rewards participation, staking multipliers, and VIP ecosystem perks.</1><1>Rank dictates the harvest. There are no participation trophies.</1>

qna6.question: How do I join?
qna6.answer: <1>The gates are open, prove your devotion, <3>apply now</3>.</1><1>Registration gives you access to program details, evaluation mechanics, and initial onboarding steps.</1><1>From there, <2>performance determines everything</2>.</1>
